description_long: This is a compact, black rifle with a robust, utilitarian design, featuring a prominent pistol grip and a tubular main body. The rifle has a fixed stock integrated into the rear, and a short, cylindrical barrel at the front. On top, there is a mounted optical sight, likely for improved aiming accuracy, and the body is adorned with various metallic and polymer components, including a visible trigger guard and magazine housing. The surface finish is mostly matte with some glossy highlights, suggesting a mix of metal and polymer materials. The overall build appears sturdy and functional, suitable for urban tactical scenarios. The rifle's compact size and ergonomic features make it ideal for maneuverability in confined spaces.
description: A compact, black tactical rifle with a fixed stock, short barrel, and mounted optical sight, featuring a robust metal and polymer construction. Its design is ergonomic and suited for urban environments.
description_view_0: Front view showing the short barrel, muzzle device, and the alignment of the optical sight above the barrel.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the pistol grip, fixed stock, magazine housing, and the mounted sight on top.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the fixed stock and the alignment of the rifle's body.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the same main features as view 1, with additional detail on the sight and barrel attachments.
